creator: eng@prowip.net.br
text:
I get a SCSI error when more than 2 disks are attached to the same bus

one or two disks do not produce the erro

I get the same error on Tyan MBs with Adaptec U320 onboard, in this case
the K8SD-Pro and K8SR. Both MBs are with the latest BIOS version, at least the 
one I found on your website

I boot wiht RH-FC6 and no problem

Tyan's support argues that it is a driver problem

Appearently, after boot, the system works and all disks are usable but I still have no load and I only tested with dd-ing some large files without problem

I changed cables and disks to be sure there is no issue with any of them.

M


Waiting 10 seconds for SCSI devices to settle
ahd0: Invalid Sequencer interrupt occurred.
